'''竏嗚-ch-f-l''' ('''kajachfeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umpire|umpire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umpire|umpire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗚-ch-f-l
|-
! Lemma
| kajachfeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijachfeloko|thijachfeloko]] || [[word:jijachfeloko|jijachfeloko]] || [[word:shijachfeloko|shijachfeloko]] || [[word:kijachfeloko|kijachfeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujachfeloko|thuthujachfeloko]] || [[word:jujujachfeloko|jujujachfeloko]] || [[word:shushujachfeloko|shushujachfeloko]] || [[word:kukujachfeloko|kukujachfeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujachfeloko|thujachfeloko]] || [[word:jujachfeloko|jujachfeloko]] || [[word:shujachfeloko|shujachfeloko]] || [[word:kujachfeloko|kujachfeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojachfeloko|thojachfeloko]] || [[word:jojachfeloko|jojachfeloko]] || [[word:shojachfeloko|shojachfeloko]] || [[word:kojachfeloko|kojachfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦjachfeloko|thﾃｦjachfeloko]] || [[word:jﾃｦjachfeloko|jﾃｦjachfeloko]] || [[word:shﾃｦjachfeloko|shﾃｦjachfeloko]] || [[word:kﾃｦjachfeloko|kﾃｦjachfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajachfeloko|thathajachfeloko]] || [[word:jajajachfeloko|jajajachfeloko]] || [[word:shashajachfeloko|shashajachfeloko]] || [[word:kakajachfeloko|kakajachfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajachfeloko|thajachfeloko]] || [[word:jajachfeloko|jajachfeloko]] || [[word:shajachfeloko|shajachfeloko]] || [[word:kajachfeloko|kajachfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajachfeloko|thajachfeloko]] || [[word:jajachfeloko|jajachfeloko]] || [[word:shajachfeloko|shajachfeloko]] || [[word:kajachfeloko|kajachfeloko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
